HOME.DESCRIPTION: I'm an independent creative developer from Colombia.
HOME.DETAILS: From building solid backend systems to designing scalable web applications, I help teams and clients bring ambitious ideas to life on the web. Whether it’s crafting efficient APIs, architecting clean database schemas, or exploring modern interfaces with thoughtful design, my focus is always on creating solutions that are robust, performant and accessible.

ABOUT.TITLE: About My Work
ABOUT.DESCRIPTION: Software developer specialized in Back-End development, primarily with Java, and experience working with .NET and Python. I have a strong background in relational databases and enterprise application architecture. I’ve worked within Agile (Scrum) environments, contributing to requirement analysis, solution design, and technical problem-solving. I’m driven by continuous learning and the adoption of emerging technologies to build efficient, scalable, and reliable systems.
ABOUT.JOB1_DESC: Worked on banking architecture systems using Java Spring to optimize and adjust enterprise applications. Supported architectural reviews aligned with APX and ASO guidelines.
ABOUT.JOB2_DESC: Participated in application training, incident resolution, and foundational learning in machine learning methodologies.
ABOUT.JOB3_DESC: Validated development documentation according to client guidelines and developed automated testing solutions with Selenium.
ABOUT.JOB4_DESC: Maintained enterprise applications using Java and JSP, integrating MySQL databases and REST APIs.
ABOUT.JOB5_DESC: Provided technical support for a banking mobile application using Veritran tools.
ABOUT.JOB6_DESC: Developed RESTful APIs using Spring Boot, JPA/ORM, MVC architecture and MySQL.

ABOUT_ME.TITLE: About Me.
ABOUT_ME.INTRO: I am a software developer and designer with experience in backend development and project design since 2019. I specialize in building efficient, scalable, and functional solutions without sacrificing creativity or user experience. I enjoy combining logic, architecture, and design to deliver projects that are solid, engaging, and easy to use.
ABOUT_ME.STORY: I was born and still live in Bogotá, where I discovered my passion for programming and designing web projects. Since then, I’ve worked in backend and full-stack development, both hybrid and remotely. I currently collaborate with clients locally and internationally, creating functional, scalable, and well-designed solutions while continuing to improve my English and German to expand my professional experience.
ABOUT_ME.HOBBIES: In my free time, I enjoy working as a photographer at events and exploring new cultures. I like maintaining a healthy lifestyle by exercising and spending time outdoors, which inspires me both personally and professionally.
